response.justification: Maria brings highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the core mandate of the role. While the resume lacks the must-have Python experience, her deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second), strong TypeScript proficiency, and proven technical leadership as a Staff Engineer and Founder make her a highly compelling candidate.
strengths: Directly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong ownership mindset and technical leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: Lacks the required strong Python expertise, focusing primarily on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
No explicit mention of participating in on-call rotations or formal incident response processes.
History of parallel roles and relatively short tenures may require probing regarding long-term commitment and focus.
